where.if: AND (item LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR spec LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.jangbi (ymd, item, location, cost, spec, lvl) VALUES (#{ymd}, #{item}, #{location}, #{cost}, #{spec}, #{lvl})
mapper.update: UPDATE cms.jangbi SET ymd = #{ymd}, item = #{item}, location = #{location}, cost = #{cost}, spec = #{spec}, lvl = #{lvl}, modify_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, ymd, item, location, cost, spec, lvl, modify_dt as modifyDt, (SELECT count(*) FROM cms.file_match fm WHERE fm.table_name = 'jangbi' AND fm.target_id = j.id AND fm.file_type = 'attachment') as attachmentCount FROM cms.jangbi j
ORDER BY ymd DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{skip}
